summary: Support triage is modeled as a gated AI workflow with human approval before outbound response. [CONFIG][INFERENCIA]

actors.decision_authority: Approve P0 escalation and outbound replies

steps.action: Load ticket JSON and escalation policy.
steps.deterministic_check: Ticket JSON validates against required fields.
steps.fallback: Block workflow and request valid ticket fixture.

steps.action: Classify ticket severity and draft response.
steps.deterministic_check: Output includes severity, rationale, source refs, and response draft fields.
steps.fallback: Hand off to support lead with failed classification packet.
steps.prompt_contract: Use ticket fields and policy excerpts only.
steps.output_contract: JSON object with severity, rationale, source_refs, draft_response.

steps.deterministic_check: Decision is one of approved, rejected, needs-info.

criteria: Approval decision must be recorded before send

fallbacks: Failed AI classification hands off to support lead after one retry. [CONFIG]
validation: All high-risk steps have approval gates and bounded retry. [CONFIG]
risks: Classifier quality requires labeled-ticket regression before production. [INFERENCIA]
